case_title: FILIN, OLEG VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED BY TAX COLLECTOR: DOES NOT BELONG TO TAX COLLECTOR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,766.42 FILED BY FILIN, OLEG AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILIN, OLEG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,575.35 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,595.35, DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FILIN, OLEG DISMISSAL OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS AT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,132.07 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FILIN, OLEG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
